content:
Fulfilling the B2B Wholesale Surge

Aoura Products, the distribution arm of Aoura Group, has officially signed a lease and commenced operations at its new 50,000 square foot B2B fulfillment and warehouse facility in Dubai Industrial City (DIC). The development marks a massive milestone in the division's scaling strategy to support logistics companies, retailers, office setups, and manufacturing operations across the UAE.

State-of-the-Art Operations

The facility is custom-configured to accommodate diverse business supplies:

  • Office Essentials & Packaging Materials: Dedicated zones for high-volume inventory storage.
  • Advanced Sorting Technology: Semi-automated picking lines designed to reduce B2B order processing times by 40%.
  • Eco-friendly Infrastructure: Energy-efficient lighting systems and electric forklift fleets to align with the group's sustainability commitments.
"Our new facility at Dubai Industrial City isn't just about square footage. It's about optimizing B2B wholesale speed, accuracy, and customer satisfaction throughout the GCC region."

Strategic Location Advantages

Positioned close to Jebel Ali Port and Al Maktoum International Airport, the facility provides rapid access to primary land, sea, and air corridors, allowing Aoura Products to guarantee next-day delivery on standard bulk supplies for commercial clients across all seven emirates.
